title: The Leonardo Collection Highland Cow Placemats – Set of 4 For Home & Kitchen | Easy Clean & Washable Place Mats For Everyday Tableware Protection | Non Slip Table Mats For Decorations & Dinner Plates
features: STYLISH PLACEMATS FOR DINING TABLES: Enhance your dining area with this set of 4 decorative placemats—perfect for protecting surfaces while adding style to daily meals or special occasions.
DURABLE AND REUSABLE DESIGN: Crafted from quality materials to withstand regular use, these place mats maintain their shape and colour even with frequent cleaning and handling.
NON SLIP FOR SECURE USE: Each table mat features a practical non slip surface, ensuring plates, cutlery, and glasses stay securely in place during meals at home or casual gatherings.
EASY TO CLEAN AND MAINTAIN: Simply wipe with a damp cloth or rinse to remove crumbs and spills—ideal for busy households seeking hassle-free kitchen mats that remain fresh.
VERSATILE FOR ALL SETTINGS: Perfect for dining rooms, kitchens, or outdoor tables—suitable as tray mats, heart placemats, or woven table mats for any décor style.
